commands:
sudo -u postgres psql -d elections -c "INSERT INTO posts (title,slug,content,excerpt,featured_image,author,category,status,published_at) VALUES ('UN Observers Arrive Ahead of Historic By-Elections','un-observers-by-elections','

A 42-member UN observer delegation has arrived to monitor by-elections across Punjab, Sindh, and KPK.

','UN observers arrive for by-election monitoring in Pakistan.','https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1529107386315-e1a2ed48a620?w=1200&q=80','GEN Correspondent','Elections','published',NOW()-INTERVAL ''2 hours'') ON CONFLICT (slug) DO NOTHING" 2>&1

sudo -u postgres psql -d elections -c "INSERT INTO posts (title,slug,content,excerpt,featured_image,author,category,status,published_at) VALUES ('Digital Voting Pilots Show 40% Higher Turnout','digital-voting-pilots-higher-turnout','

Pakistan first digital voting pilot recorded a 40% surge in urban turnout with 4-second biometric verification.

','Digital voting pilots show 40% higher turnout in urban constituencies.','https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1540910419892-4a36d2c3266c?w=1200&q=80','Sarah Khan','Technology','published',NOW()-INTERVAL ''5 hours'') ON CONFLICT (slug) DO NOTHING" 2>&1

sudo -u postgres psql -d elections -c "INSERT INTO posts (title,slug,content,excerpt,featured_image,author,category,status,published_at) VALUES ('Supreme Court Rules on Constituency Boundary Redraw','supreme-court-constituency-boundaries','

The Supreme Court ordered a full delimitation of all 342 National Assembly constituencies citing 1998 census data.

','Supreme Court orders full constituency delimitation before next general election.','https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1589829545856-d10d557cf95f?w=1200&q=80','Imran Baig','Elections','published',NOW()-INTERVAL ''8 hours'') ON CONFLICT (slug) DO NOTHING" 2>&1

sudo -u postgres psql -d elections -c "INSERT INTO posts (title,slug,content,excerpt,featured_image,author,category,status,published_at) VALUES ('Government Meeting on Electoral Reforms Concludes in Islamabad','govt-meeting-electoral-reforms-2026','

Senior ministers and ECP officials concluded a two-day government meeting on electoral reforms including biometric verification rollout and media access protocols.

','Two-day government meeting on electoral reforms concludes with key resolutions on digital voting and observer access.','https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1521791136064-7986c2920216?w=1200&q=80','GEN Editorial Board','Government Meeting','published',NOW()-INTERVAL ''12 hours'') ON CONFLICT (slug) DO NOTHING" 2>&1

sudo -u postgres psql -d elections -c "INSERT INTO posts (title,slug,content,excerpt,featured_image,author,category,status,published_at) VALUES ('Youth Voter Registration Surges 34% via Digital Campaign','youth-voter-registration-surge','

A 90-day digital campaign registered 2.3 million first-time voters aged 18-25 with female registrations at 51%.

','Youth voter registration surges 34% as digital campaign drives civic engagement across Pakistan.','https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1529156069898-49953e39b3ac?w=1200&q=80','Zainab Hussain','Analysis','published',NOW()-INTERVAL ''1 day'') ON CONFLICT (slug) DO NOTHING" 2>&1

sudo -u postgres psql -d elections -c "INSERT INTO posts (title,slug,content,excerpt,featured_image,author,category,status,published_at) VALUES ('Biometric Verification Deployed at 3400 Polling Stations','biometric-verification-3400-stations','

The ECP deployed biometric fingerprint verification to 3400 polling stations in the largest technology rollout in Pakistan electoral history.

','New biometric verification system deployed across 3400 polling stations nationwide.','https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1563013544-824ae1b704d3?w=1200&q=80','Ali Hassan','Technology','published',NOW()-INTERVAL ''2 days'') ON CONFLICT (slug) DO NOTHING" 2>&1

sudo -u postgres psql -d elections -c "INSERT INTO posts (title,slug,content,excerpt,featured_image,author,category,status,published_at) VALUES ('How Pakistan Election Monitoring Compares Internationally','pakistan-monitoring-international-standards','

A comparative analysis benchmarks Pakistan electoral monitoring against global standards identifying progress and gaps.

','Pakistan election monitoring compared against international standards — progress made, gaps remain.','https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1521791136064-7986c2920216?w=1200&q=80','Dr. Ayesha Raza','International','published',NOW()-INTERVAL ''3 days'') ON CONFLICT (slug) DO NOTHING" 2>&1

sudo -u postgres psql -d elections -c "INSERT INTO posts (title,slug,content,excerpt,featured_image,author,category,status,published_at) VALUES ('GEN Issues Press Freedom Alert After Journalists Barred','gen-press-freedom-alert-2026','

GEN issued a formal Press Freedom Alert after accredited journalists were prevented from entering polling areas in three constituencies.

','GEN issues Press Freedom Alert after journalists blocked from three polling stations.','https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1504711434969-e33886168f5c?w=1200&q=80','GEN Editorial Board','Press','published',NOW()-INTERVAL ''4 days'') ON CONFLICT (slug) DO NOTHING" 2>&1

sudo -u postgres psql -d elections -c "INSERT INTO posts (title,slug,content,excerpt,featured_image,author,category,status,published_at) VALUES ('Annual Government Meeting on Election Security Protocols','annual-govt-meeting-security-2025','

The annual government security coordination meeting reviewed election day protocols and inter-agency communication plans for 2025.

','Annual government meeting reviews election security protocols and inter-agency coordination for 2025.','https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1523050854058-8df90110c9f1?w=1200&q=80','GEN Staff','Government Meeting','published','2025-03-15 10:00:00') ON CONFLICT (slug) DO NOTHING" 2>&1

sudo -u postgres psql -d elections -c "INSERT INTO posts (title,slug,content,excerpt,featured_image,author,category,status,published_at) VALUES ('2024 General Election Results Analysis','general-election-results-analysis-2024','

A comprehensive analysis of the 2024 general election results examining turnout trends party performance and regional patterns.

','Full analysis of 2024 general election results including turnout trends and party performance across all provinces.','https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1551836022-deb4988cc6c0?w=1200&q=80','Prof. Khalid Mehmood','Analysis','published','2024-02-20 09:00:00') ON CONFLICT (slug) DO NOTHING" 2>&1
sudo -u postgres psql -d elections -c "SELECT COUNT(*) as total, STRING_AGG(DISTINCT category, ', ') as categories FROM posts" 2>&1
